name: BentoPDF
short_desc: Privacy-first, client-side PDF toolkit for merging, editing, converting, and securing PDFs
author: alam00000
description: BentoPDF is a powerful, privacy-first PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. Merge, split, edit, convert, compress, encrypt, sign, OCR, and watermark PDFs without uploading files to any server. Self-hostable with 100+ tools and no usage limits.

form_fields.label: Disable IPv6
form_fields.hint: Set to true if your environment does not support IPv6
